title: DocGraph Governance and Specs Index
purpose: Machine-readable canonical navigation index for governance, architecture, policy, and specification documents in the DocGraph Rust sandbox.

notes: F9.5 declarative/mock AI governance is completed.
This index does not open execution.

document_type.procedural: Defines step-by-step process to comply with normative rules.
document_type.boundary: Defines allowed and forbidden responsibilities for a layer or surface.
document_type.descriptive: Explains current state or architecture without creating new authority.
document_type.proposal: Future concept; not implemented unless explicitly stated.

status.generated: Produced by tooling from current workspace state.

runtime_effect.declarative_only: May declare data/resources but does not execute.

global_invariants: No document in this index may override governance/GOVERNANCE.md.
No UI spec may introduce runtime, filesystem, LLM, or tool execution authority.
No tool spec may bypass tool_runtime.
No LLM spec may execute in F9/F9.5.
No project pipeline may be duplicated outside project_runtime.
resources/ declares; crates/ implement only when phase permits.
assets/ is staging, not runtime truth.
Proposals must not be treated as implemented runtime behavior.

documents.title: Repository README
documents.role: Top-level overview of DocGraph Rust sandbox, current maturity, crate map, validation commands, and roadmap.

documents.title: Governance
documents.role: Global governance contract for system growth, phase discipline, inherited doctrine, and non-negotiable boundaries.

documents.title: Architecture
documents.role: Defines current architectural center, crate responsibilities, dependency direction, and inside/outside system boundary.

documents.title: Functional Scope
documents.role: States implemented capabilities, planned phases, F9-ready declarations, F9 gaps, and F9 exit criteria.

documents.title: Workspace Rules
documents.role: Defines structural workspace constraints, path discipline, validation discipline, and current layering rules.

documents.title: Migration Baseline
documents.role: Defines Python as doctrinal reference and Rust as active implementation target.

documents.title: UI Slint Policy
documents.role: Defines Slint as presentation technology and forbids runtime, filesystem, LLM, and tool logic in views.

documents.title: I18N Policy
documents.role: Defines externalized user-visible UI text and supported UI languages.

documents.title: UI Theme Policy
documents.role: Defines resource-driven semantic theme tokens for light and dark modes.

documents.title: LLM Runtime Policy
documents.role: Defines LLM execution doctrine, modes, deterministic planning, provider separation, model catalog governance, and observability requirements.

documents.title: Inherited Governance
documents.role: Maps inherited Python governance principles to Rust sandbox adaptations.

documents.title: Knowledge Transfer Map
documents.role: Maps Python source knowledge to Rust target files and transfer type.

documents.title: Module Mapping
documents.role: Maps Python responsibilities to Rust target crates by responsibility, not superficial folder copying.

documents.title: Action Policy
documents.role: Declares F9 action risk, decision outcomes, human-in-the-loop policy, and blocked actions.

documents.title: Action Resolution
documents.role: Defines declarative ActionRequest to Trace governance chain for future execution phases.

documents.title: Active Context
documents.role: Defines future active-context model derived from selected workspace tab and explicit references.

documents.title: AI Governance F9.5
documents.role: Declares F9.5 AI governance resources, semantic proposal preparation, disabled execution flags, and readonly/mock UI surface.

documents.title: Artifact Graph
documents.role: Defines graph folder as traceable relationship layer, not runtime authority.

documents.title: Chat Document Flows
documents.role: Defines tree, clip, chat, and workspace tab interaction model and chat session folder contract.

documents.title: Document Export

documents.role: Documents future governed editing model for ARTIFACT documents without implementing runtime or UI behavior.

documents.role: Defines reference and bibliography system.

documents.role: Defines lifecycle states for future semantic quads as proposal governance, not approved knowledge.

documents.role: Defines source-scope boundaries for semantic proposal preparation without broad catalog or runtime expansion.

documents.title: Specs Index

documents.title: Text Selection
documents.role: Governs structured text selection references tied to document integrity and trace.

documents.title: Transform Popup
documents.role: Governs contextual transformation intent capture and proposal-state controls without patch application.

documents.role: Governs structured memory of transformation attempts, proposals, and decisions without graph or execution authority.

documents.title: Transformation Core
documents.role: Canonical conceptual source for transformation vocabulary, proposal lineage, overlay, preview, timeline, and recipe concepts.

documents.title: Transformation Recipes
documents.role: Governs reusable declarative transformation patterns derived from timeline or future suggestions.

documents.title: UI Preferences Popups
documents.role: Defines governed preference, credential, and settings popup presentation boundaries and i18n popup keys.

documents.title: Workspace Layout
documents.role: Defines central layout relationships for tree, chat, tabs workspace, viewer, and conditional sandbox presentation.

consolidation_candidates.note: Navigation metadata may be normalized without merging spec content or changing authority.
Advisory only; preserve Lume as help/interaction layer without execution.
Advisory only; do not merge catalogs, UI surface, or execution boundaries into the procedure.
Advisory only; credentials_policy.md remains separate because it owns privacy and secret boundaries.
Advisory only; preserve proposal/future status and no creation/export runtime.
Advisory only; preserve proposal-not-fact and no RDF/Oxigraph/runtime execution.
Advisory only; do not perform before manual review because this cluster is a dense UI/proposal boundary.
Advisory only; high risk because UI presentation must not become policy or runtime authority.

recommended_validation.json_syntax: Validate as strict JSON after every edit.
